headline: Executive Vice President | Strategy & Business Development | AVIXA Sustainability Advisory Group Member
summary:
Welcome to my LinkedIn profile! I am Ruben Rengel, currently serving as Executive Vice President at Absen, contributing to the strategic direction of the Display Business Group and leading initiatives in strategy, business development, and global market growth. My focus is on aligning cross-regional efforts, empowering teams, and delivering innovative solutions that strengthen Absen’s leadership in display technologies and create value across diverse industries.

As an alumnus of Harvard Business School, I bring a multidisciplinary approach to leadership—combining an EMBA from Harvard’s PLDA program, an MBA, and a Master’s degree in Electronics Engineering. This foundation enables me to tackle complex challenges, guide strategic decisions, and drive sustainable results across international markets.

Throughout my career, I have led diverse teams, optimized sales channels, and built high-impact partnerships across Europe, the USA, Asia, and Latin America. My passion lies in leveraging innovation, collaboration, and strategic foresight to achieve long-term growth and meaningful outcomes for stakeholders.

Beyond my role at Absen, I actively engage in industry organizations and advisory boards. I currently serve as a member of the AVIXA Sustainability Advisory Group, contributing to initiatives that promote environmental responsibility, governance, and sustainable development across the professional AV industry.

Let’s connect to explore collaboration opportunities and share insights into the trends shaping the future of the display industry.

experiences.title: Executive Vice President
experiences.description: As part of Absen’s senior executive team, I contribute to global accounts strategy and business development initiatives. My role focuses on aligning cross-regional efforts to drive sustainable growth, fostering collaboration among global teams, and enhancing Absen’s position as a leader in the display solutions market. With expertise in international sales systems, strategic partnerships, and client-centric strategies, I am dedicated to empowering teams and delivering impactful results. This aligns with Absen’s strategic pillars of technology, people, and brand to ensure long-term success for the company and its global partners.

experiences.title: Vice General Manager of International Sales
experiences.description: In this role, I focus on supporting Business Units in their sales efforts, aligning strategies, and driving sales performance. My responsibilities include providing strategic guidance, fostering collaboration across units, and optimizing sales processes to achieve growth targets. This position complements my responsibilities as Vice President, enabling cohesive execution of Absen’s global sales strategy and ensuring alignment with our market expansion goals.

experiences.title: Senior Vice President, Global Business Development
experiences.description: As part of Absen’s executive leadership, I lead the company’s global growth strategy, focusing on market expansion and strategic partnerships. My role involves identifying new opportunities, optimizing distribution channels, and guiding cross-regional initiatives to reinforce Absen’s leadership across diverse sectors, including sports, entertainment, OOH, corporate, and more. By aligning market insights with strategic execution, I drive sustainable growth and value creation, positioning Absen as a trusted partner across multiple industries.

experiences.title: Managing Director, Europe&Oceania
experiences.description: Led the development of Absen’s European team, establishing a scalable sales channel structure (VAD/VAP) and managing the European P&L to drive strategic growth and market expansion. Absen is a global leader in LED display solutions with over 2,000 employees and 18 subsidiaries worldwide. Its products are installed in more than 140 countries, with 60,000+ successful projects across sports, outdoor advertising, corporate, and live events sectors. Recognized as the leading Chinese LED display manufacturer for 12 consecutive years, Absen emphasizes quality, innovation, and exceptional service. In this role, I focused on enhancing the European sales network and building strategic channel partnerships to expand market share and revenue. My efforts aligned local execution with Absen’s global vision, driving sustainable growth and operational efficiency while capitalizing on new business opportunities in key European markets.

experiences.title: Head of Sales (EVP)
experiences.description: As the International Head of Sales at Imago Group, I lead the business strategy across all key segments: sports, digital signage, and traffic solutions (variable message signs). In this role, I report directly to the CEO, shaping the direction of each business unit while fostering growth and market expansion. Imago Group specializes in innovative LED solutions, catering to sports venues, digital signage, OOH advertising, and architectural lighting, with a dedicated focus on LED traffic signs. Our clients include globally recognized companies, top-tier sports teams, marketing agencies, and governments. Among our proud partners are football giants like Manchester United, FC Barcelona, and Real Madrid; premium retail brands like Giorgio Armani; and iconic music events such as U2 world tours and the Sonar festival. Additionally, we serve Traffic Departments in Spain, Germany, Brazil, the US, and India.

experiences.title: Sales Director, Video Division
experiences.description: Oversaw international sales for the Video Business Unit, focusing on the OOH and Pro AV markets. Developed strategic sales plans to drive growth and market penetration, working closely with the EVP of Sales and key partners. Successfully expanded the unit’s reach by building strong client relationships and delivering innovative digital signage solutions tailored to industry needs.

experiences.title: Sales Manager
experiences.description: Led sales operations for Spain and Portugal in the Media division, focusing on market expansion and driving revenue growth. Developed strategic relationships with key clients and stakeholders to strengthen Barco’s presence and enhance its market share. Collaborated closely with the European Sales Director to align regional sales strategies with overall company goals. In this role, I leveraged Barco’s cutting-edge visualization technologies to deliver impactful solutions, ensuring business growth and customer satisfaction. My efforts contributed to establishing Barco as a leader in innovative media solutions across the region.

experiences.title: Customer Support Engineer
experiences.description: Provided technical support for high-end video projection systems (LCD, DLP, CRT) across pre-sales and post-sales phases. Specialized in solutions for presentations, large-scale auditoriums, corporate events, control rooms, simulation, and planetariums. As an expert in integrating Barco’s visualization technologies, I played a key role in delivering seamless solutions in sectors like healthcare, enterprise, and entertainment. I collaborated with clients to design and troubleshoot complex systems, ensuring optimal performance and customer satisfaction.

experiences.title: Sales Engineer
experiences.description: Launched my career as a Sales Engineer, focusing on providing technical expertise and sales support for innovative solutions. Engaged directly with clients to understand their needs and deliver tailored offerings, driving successful sales outcomes. This role sharpened my technical knowledge and client-facing skills, setting a strong foundation for my sales career.

education.field_of_study: Program for Leadership Development, HBS Executive MBA, HBS Alumnus

volunteer_work.title: Member – Sustainability Advisory Group
volunteer_work.description: Appointed as a member of AVIXA’s Sustainability Advisory Group to support the advancement of sustainable practices across the professional AV industry. Contributing insights and strategic input to guide responsible growth and environmental initiatives within the global AV community.

recommendations:
Jordi Molins

Ruben was working several years in our organization, starting as Customer Support Engineer and moving to Sales Executive for LED screens with high successful in sales, thanks to their dedication, professionalism and interest in our customers and products

Khalid Sweidan

I have known Ruben for many years since the time that we both worked for Barco NV.  As a Territory Sales Manager for Spain and Portugal, Ruben has always been extremely effective, proactive, and easy to work with.  He has consistently met and exceeded his sales projections.  We used to meet on a regular basis to discuss sales strategies, and his input on competition, market intelligence and projects was appreciated by the sales force worldwide.  I strongly believe that Ruben is an asset to any organization.
